escalation.rationale: Russian unilateral ceasefire declaration amid threats to strike Kyiv on Victory Day, combined with Ukraine's major drone offensive and US-Iran naval clashes in Strait of Hormuz.

ticker_items: Russia declares 3-day ceasefire for Victory Day parade
Ukraine launches second-biggest drone attack of war
US helicopters sink Iranian boats in Strait of Hormuz
Israeli strikes break month-long Lebanon ceasefire lull
North Korea drops reunification from constitution

eastern_europe.description: Russian drones entered Romanian airspace escalating NATO tensions
Ukrainian military hit Russian missile carrier warship in Caspian Sea strike
Ukraine launches second-biggest drone attack of war amid Victory Day preparations

middle_east.description: Israeli strike kills Hezbollah Radwan Force commander and 11 others
US forces engaged Iranian forces in Strait of Hormuz amid ceasefire violations
Israeli warplanes struck Beirut southern suburbs targeting Hezbollah Radwan Force commander
US Apache and Seahawk helicopters sank half dozen Iranian small boats
Israeli warplanes strike Beirut suburbs targeting Hezbollah commander, breaking month-long ceasefire
US Apache and Seahawk helicopters sink half dozen Iranian small boats while clearing shipping threats

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths

claimed_totals.figure: ~3,468 dead in Iran, ~2,702 dead in Lebanon, ~28 in Gulf states

russia.text: All Russian troop groups in the special operation zone will completely cease hostilities for the duration of the ceasefire declared by Russia
russia.speaker: Russian Defense Ministry
russia.title: Ministry Spokesperson

ukraine.text: Putin only cares about parades, not human lives
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelensky
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

ukraine.text: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky warned allies of Russia against attending its 9 May World War II victory parade
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelensky
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: A deal with Iran was very possible but threatened to again bomb the country if negotiations fell apart
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: The United States and the Israeli regime must recognize the rights of the Iranian nation to pave the way for putting an end to the war
middle_east.speaker: Iranian Defense Ministry Spokesperson
middle_east.title: Ministry Spokesperson

observers.description: Polish military training civilians in weekend drills focusing on wartime preparedness including go-bags and water purification. Training conducted at military base in Cieszyn with participants ranging from grandparents to teenagers.
Criticized by Trump advisor as betraying US during Iran war alongside Italy and Spain. Dmitry Medvedev accused Germany of militarization and revanchism ahead of Victory Day.

Turkey unveiled its first intercontinental ballistic missile, the Yildirimhan ICBM, with 6,000km range and Mach 25 speed capability. The development significantly enhances Turkey's strategic deterrent capabilities amid regional tensions.

North Korea declared it is not bound by nuclear non-proliferation treaties and revised constitution to drop reunification references. Kim Jong Un was formally designated as head of nuclear forces, signaling permanent adversarial stance toward South Korea.

US approved $374 million bomb kit sales to Ukraine while awaiting Iran's response to latest ceasefire proposal. Secretary Rubio visiting Vatican to mend ties after Trump's criticism of Pope Leo XIV over Iran war.

International Olympic Committee supports lifting ban on Belarusian athletes, allowing full national identity competition rather than neutral status. This represents a political shift despite ongoing Ukraine war.

Reports indicate Hungary is no longer considered a stalwart Russian ally, representing slipping Moscow influence in Eastern Europe. The loss of Hungarian support marks broader regional shift away from Russia.
UAE announced departure from OPEC effective May 1st, stripping the oil cartel of its third-largest producer. This weakens OPEC leverage over global oil supplies amid Iran war disruptions.

financial.notes: ASEAN leaders adopt economic measures to ease pain from Iran war, with bloc importing over half crude oil from Middle East.

update_log.text: Russia declares complete cessation of hostilities during May 8-10 Victory Day ceasefire period

Russia boosts Putin security amid Ukrainian assassination threat warnings
